description: AI Agent Manager quality gates and monitoring

hooks.prompt: A worker agent just completed. Review its output to verify: (1) it produced a WORKER_RESULT block, (2) files_modified is not empty, (3) a .worker-summary.md file was written to the worktree, (4) it didn't report errors that went unresolved. Context: $ARGUMENTS. Respond with {"ok": true} if the worker completed successfully, or {"ok": false, "reason": "..."} if there are issues that need attention.

An Execute Manager agent just completed. Review its output to verify: (1) it produced an EXECUTE_RESULT or EXECUTE_CHECKPOINT block, (2) the block contains subtasks_completed and worktrees fields, (3) merge_order is present if status is completed. Context: $ARGUMENTS. Respond with {"ok": true} if valid, or {"ok": false, "reason": "..."} if the output is malformed or missing required fields.

A task is being marked complete. Verify from the context that the task appears genuinely done — not just abandoned or skipped. Check: (1) task subject suggests work was done, (2) no obvious incomplete state. Context: $ARGUMENTS. Respond with {"ok": true} if complete, or {"ok": false, "reason": "..."} if incomplete.
